name: threatq-get-all-indicators

outputs.description: ID of the indicator. ThreatQ.Indicator.Source.ID Source ID of the indicator.

outputs.description: Source name of the indicator. ThreatQ.Indicator.Attribute.ID Attribute ID of the of the indicator.
outputs.name: ThreatQ.Indicator.Source.Name

outputs.description: Attribute name of the indicator. ThreatQ.Indicator.Attribute.Value Attribute value of the indicator.
outputs.name: ThreatQ.Indicator.Attribute.Name

outputs.description: date The creation date of the indicator. ThreatQ.Indicator.UpdatedAt
outputs.name: ThreatQ.Indicator.CreatedAt

outputs.description: The last update date of the indicator. ThreatQ.Indicator.Description The description of the indicator.
outputs.name: date

outputs.description: The value of the indicator. ThreatQ.Indicator.Status The status of the indicator.
outputs.name: ThreatQ.Indicator.Value

outputs.description: The type of the indicator. For example, IP Address. ThreatQ.Indicator.TQScore
outputs.name: ThreatQ.Indicator.Type
